about.title: About Us
about.visionText1: At "World Civilizations", we strive to build civilizational awareness that combines authenticity and modernity. We believe that knowledge is the bridge connecting the past to the future, and that rereading our intellectual heritage through contemporary eyes is the way to understand our present and envision our future.
about.visionText2: "World Civilizations" is not just a blog — it is an intellectual community that brings together researchers, intellectuals, and readers around one table, where we exchange ideas and engage in discussions about issues that shape our collective consciousness.
about.spreadKnowledgeDesc: Delivering rich intellectual and cultural content that enriches awareness.
about.constructiveDialogueDesc: Creating spaces for diverse and multidimensional intellectual dialogue.
about.buildCommunityDesc: Forming a community of intellectuals, researchers, and interested readers.

writeWithUs.title: Write With Us
writeWithUs.subtitle: We welcome writers and researchers who wish to contribute rich intellectual and cultural content on our platform.
writeWithUs.guideline1: Content must be original, fully owned by the publisher, and not previously published in print or digitally.
writeWithUs.guideline2: Language quality and proper phrasing, completely free of spelling and grammatical errors.
writeWithUs.guideline3: The article must align with the platform's vision of building civilizational and cultural awareness.
writeWithUs.guideline4: The article must not exceed 5,000 words, while maintaining depth and comprehensiveness.
writeWithUs.guideline5: Commitment to objectivity and scientific integrity in presenting facts.
writeWithUs.guideline6: Accurate and clear documentation of sources and references to ensure content credibility.
writeWithUs.loginRequiredDesc: Join our cultural community and share your ideas and research with thousands of readers interested in history and human thought.
writeWithUs.articleTitlePlaceholder: Enter a deep and expressive title...
writeWithUs.noTags: No tags available at the moment
writeWithUs.dragOrClick: Drag an image here or click to upload
writeWithUs.imageFormat: JPG, PNG or WebP format (max 5 MB)
writeWithUs.successDesc: Thank you for your contribution. The editorial team will review the article and notify you of the result within 7 business days.
writeWithUs.imageSizeError: Image size must not exceed 5 MB
writeWithUs.imageTypeError: Only JPG, PNG, or WebP images are allowed

terms.title: Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy
terms.intro: Welcome to World Civilizations. By using this website, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you do not agree, please stop using the website.
terms.section1P1: World Civilizations provides a digital space for publishing, reading, and sharing books, articles, and text content by both the administration and registered users.
terms.section1P2: All users must use the website legally and in accordance with EU laws, and must not publish any offensive, illegal, or infringing content, or use the site for spam or fraudulent content.
terms.section1P3: The site administration reserves the right to delete any violating content or suspend or terminate user accounts at any time without prior notice.
terms.section2P1: Some site services may require creating an account. The user is fully responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials and any activity through their account.
terms.section3P1: Each user retains full intellectual property rights to the content they publish. However, by publishing content on the platform, they grant the site a non-exclusive license to use it within the platform, including display, storage, and distribution. Publishing any content that infringes copyright or intellectual property of others is strictly prohibited.
terms.section3P2: The site administration reserves the right to delete any violating content without prior notice. If you believe any content on the platform infringes your intellectual property rights, you can contact us via email:
terms.section3P3: The report will be reviewed and appropriate action taken in accordance with applicable European laws.
terms.section4P1: We comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union. Only necessary personal data is collected for operating and improving site services. Personal data is not sold or shared with any third party and is only used to improve user experience.
terms.section4P2: Users have the right to request access to, modify, or delete their personal data or object to its processing.
terms.section5P1: The platform administration reserves the right to review and delete any content that violates these terms or applicable laws, and may temporarily or permanently suspend the site or user accounts without prior notice.
terms.section6P1: These terms may be modified at any time and the updated version will be published on this page with the review date updated.
terms.section6P2: These terms and conditions are governed by EU laws and applicable local laws in the country of platform operation.
